channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SpaceX IPO signals potential peak in a heated bull market
item.description: The article views SpaceX’s planned IPO as a litmus test for the strength and maturity of the current bull market. It questions the financial logic of valuing SpaceX at roughly $1.8 trillion despite su...

item.title: Burst Pipe Causes Flooding and Suspension of Rail Services at Heathrow Airport
item.description: Passengers travelling to and from Heathrow Airport faced significant disruption after a burst pipe caused flooding that led to a signal failure near Heathrow Terminals 2 and 3. The incident resulted i...

item.title: Blue Origin Rocket Explosion Expected to Delay NASA Moon Base Timeline by at Least One Year
item.description: A reported setback involving a Blue Origin rocket has raised concerns about the timeline for NASA’s planned lunar missions and the broader goal of establishing a long-term human presence on the Moon. ...

item.title: Families Identify Loved Ones After Utumishi Girls Academy Fire in Nakuru
item.description: Families of victims of the tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, have been going through intense emotional pain as they identify their deceased relatives. The fire, allegedly...

item.title: Growing US interest in Canada’s expanded citizenship-by-descent rules amid political tensions
item.description: New data from Canada’s immigration authorities shows a sharp rise in applications for proof of citizenship by descent following recent changes to the country’s citizenship laws. Under updated rules, C...

item.title: Arthur Brooks Says Limiting Smartphone Use During Key Daily Moments Can Support Meaning and Well-Being
item.description: In a CNN interview discussing his book 'The Meaning of Your Life: Finding Purpose in an Age of Emptiness,' Harvard professor Arthur Brooks argues that smartphones and other digital technologies can in...

item.title: Nyeri Governor Calls for Public Consultation on Proposed US Ebola Facility in Laikipia
item.description: Nyeri Governor Mutahi Kahiga has joined other leaders and local communities in opposing the establishment of a 50-bed Ebola containment centre in Laikipia, Kenya, planned by the United States. The opp...

item.title: Kruger agreement recognises land rights while preserving conservation model
item.description: A landmark agreement has been signed at Kruger National Park, marking a significant step in addressing historical land dispossession while maintaining the park’s conservation integrity. The beneficiat...

item.title: High Court upholds 30-year prison sentence in Kilosa rape and assault conviction case
item.description: The High Court of Tanzania sitting at the Morogoro Sub-Registry has upheld a 30-year prison sentence against Ramadhani Yahaya, also known as Msabaha, who was convicted by the Kilosa District Court for...

item.title: Cholera outbreak in Borno State causes 37 deaths and over 3,000 infections across seven LGAs
item.description: Borno State in north-east Nigeria is currently battling a serious cholera outbreak that has already led to 37 confirmed deaths and more than 3,000 recorded cases within the month of May. According to ...

item.title: Ol Kalou MP aspirant Paul Waiganjo leaves DCP following disputed nomination results
item.description: Paul Waiganjo, a philanthropist turned politician and aspiring MP for Ol Kalou constituency, has officially exited the Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP) after losing in the party nominations held...

item.title: US Defense chief calls for stronger allied military spending amid concerns over China’s expansion
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth warned Asian allies about China’s rapidly expanding military capability during the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, stressing the need for stronger regional defense ...

item.title: Genesis Owusu announces 2026 UK and European tour dates in support of new album
item.description: Genesis Owusu has announced a major UK and European tour scheduled for winter 2026, following the release of his latest album, ‘Redstar Wu & The Worldwide Scourge’. The Ghanaian-Australian artist will...

item.title: ER Doctor Shares His Travel Tip for Better Sleep and Enjoyable Trips
item.description: Dr. Calvin Sun, an emergency room physician based in New York City and an experienced world traveler, emphasizes the importance of quality sleep when traveling. Despite common advice to focus on hydra...

item.title: Book Review of Guruprasad Kaginele's Kaaya: Body as Site of Desire, Disease and Violence
item.description: This article presents a detailed review of Guruprasad Kaginele's fourth novel titled Kaaya, translated from Kannada by Narayan Shankaran. The story revolves around characters like Dr Malakheda (known ...

item.title: Blue Micromoon Visible Tonight Until 2053: What It Is and How to Observe It
item.description: The blue micromoon occurring on May 30, 2026, combines two astronomical terms but does not actually appear blue or dramatically small. A blue moon refers to the second full moon within a single calend...

item.title: Massive underground mining bee colony discovered beneath historic New York cemetery
item.description: Researchers from Cornell University have uncovered an extraordinary underground bee colony living beneath East Lawn Cemetery in Ithaca, New York. The colony, belonging to the solitary mining bee speci...

item.title: Typhoon Domeng intensifies offshore, enhances southwest monsoon over Philippines
item.description: Typhoon Domeng (Jangmi) intensified from a severe tropical storm into a typhoon on May 30, 2026, while remaining over the Philippine Sea. PAGASA reported maximum sustained winds of 120 km/h, with gust...

item.title: KP Chief Minister Seeks Judicial Oversight Over Alleged Electoral Irregularities in Gilgit-Baltistan
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi has written to the Chief Justice of the Supreme Appellate Court of Gilgit-Baltistan, requesting immediate judicial intervention to safeguard the transpa...

item.title: Governor Hochul Reverses Pension Reforms, Increasing Costs for Taxpayers
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul has reversed pension reforms that were originally implemented under former Governor Andrew Cuomo in 2012. Cuomo had negotiated changes to address the growing pension obl...
